item.title: How Do Proprietary Trading Firms Make Money? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explains the main revenue models of prop trading firms, including performance-based profits, challenge fees, and other income streams. It clarifies how firms manage risk while allowing traders to access firm capital. The article aims to demystify how prop firms remain profitable and sustainable over time.

item.title: Axcera February 2026 Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: February was a focused month for Axcera. The team shipped a platform update built around operational efficiency and power-user control, represented the brand at iFX EXPO Dubai, and published three pieces of content directly relevant to prop firms evaluating or scaling their infrastructure.

item.title: How Axcera Enables Prop Firms to Trade Multiple Markets From One Platform | Axcera Blog
item.description: Traditional prop firms build their entire operation around one asset class. Maybe you offer only Forex challenges because that is what you know. Or you focus exclusively on Futures because your team has experience there.

item.title: Axcera January 2026 Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: We entered 2026 with clear priorities around platformmaturity, leadership depth, and long-term market positioning.This month brought meaningful progress across threeareas: technology leadership, product positioning, and infrastructure-focusedthought leadership.

item.title: The Multi-Asset Advantage: Why Prop Trading Firms Are Adopting a Multi-Asset Model | Axcera Blog
item.description: Adopt a multi-asset prop trading model to attract more traders, increase retention, and diversify revenue. Run forex, futures, and crypto on one unified platform built for scale.

item.title: Why Most Prop Firms Break from the Inside Out | Axcera Blog
item.description: Prop trading is no longer an experimental model or a niche within retail trading. It has evolved into a sophisticated, fast-scaling business model with serious operational demands.On the surface, the format looks simple: traders get access to virtual capital, complete challenges, and earn profit splits. But beneath that, the complexity rivals that of a brokerage.

item.title: 5 Warning Signs Your Prop Trading Technology Is Holding You Back | Axcera Blog
item.description: Growth problems in prop firms often start with technology. Discover the five warning signs that your infrastructure is slowing operations, increasing risk, and limiting scalability.

item.title: How Can Prop Firms Handle Major Market-Shaking Events? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post offers guidance on how prop firms can prepare for and navigate major market-shaking events, such as elections or geopolitical shocks. It emphasises scenario planning, risk limits, and robust technology. The article stresses that both defensive measures and fast decision-making are crucial in high-volatility periods.

item.title: When Should You Not Start A Proprietary Trading Business? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explores scenarios where starting a prop firm may be a bad idea, such as insufficient capital, lack of risk understanding, or purely trend-driven motives. It encourages would-be founders to honestly assess their goals, resources, and expertise. The article frames “not starting” in some conditions as a rational, risk-aware decision.

item.title: Axcera Introduces a New Website Built for a Broader Trading Firm Platform | Axcera Blog
item.description: We are excited to announce the launch of our redesigned website. The new Axcera website marks a strategic shift, not a visual refresh. It reflects the evolution of the platform from a single-product, prop-focused solution into a multi-solution infrastructure partner for modern trading firms.

item.title: The Scalability Crisis Facing Prop Trading Firms | Axcera Blog
item.description: Why most prop firms hit growth walls at 1,000 traders and how modern infrastructure enables true mass scalability.The prop trading industry has a scalability problem. Most firms start with manual processes that work fine for a few hundred traders. But when growth accelerates, these same processes become operational nightmares that kill momentum and destroy trader experience.

item.title: How Prop Firms Can Attract More Traders | Axcera Blog
item.description: Building trust, leveraging advanced technology, and creating a professional trader experience are the keys to long-term growth.The competition among proprietary trading firms is more intense than ever. With new entrants launching daily and trader expectations rising, the firms that succeed are not those offering the largest funding, but those that build trust and deliver seamless, technology-driven experiences.

item.title: Axcera December 2025 Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: December was a quieter month for product releases, but an important one for industry direction. As prop trading matures, firms are rethinking their models, infrastructure, and long-term strategy.

item.title: Strengthening the Core: Gabriela Jakabova Joins Axcera as COO | Axcera Blog
item.description: This announcement introduces Gabriela Jakabova as Axcera’s new Chief Operating Officer. The post outlines her experience in operations and scaling, and how she will drive the next phase of Axcera’s growth. It emphasizes a focus on operational excellence, client delivery, and internal alignment to support expanding global demand.

item.title: Axcera Appoints Zbyšek Němec as Chief Technology Officer | Axcera Blog
item.description: Zbyšek joins Axcera with more than 20 years of experience leading technology organizations through periods of rapid growth, structural change, and global scale. His career spans senior leadership roles as CTO, VP of Engineering, and COO, with a strong track record of transforming early-stage products into mature, enterprise-grade SaaS platforms.

item.title: Axcera's July Roundup: Must-Read Strategies for Prop Firm Growth | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera’s July roundup focuses on sharing hard-earned insights from helping over 50 prop firms scale sustainably. Instead of new features, it delivers practical strategies on automation, operational control, UX, and responsible gamification. The guides emphasize building systems that reduce burnout while supporting long-term growth.

item.title: Exactly How Far Has Prop Firm Tech Advanced? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article traces the evolution of prop firm technology from early systems to today’s advanced platforms. It highlights major inflection points, such as electronic trading, connectivity, and automation. The post shows how these advances have transformed speed, access, and risk management for firms of all sizes.

item.title: DeepCharts Launch: What 10,000+ Traders Learned About Order Flow (And Why Infrastructure Matters) | Axcera Blog
item.description: The DeepCharts™ launch highlighted a major shift toward institutional-grade tools becoming accessible to prop and retail traders. The event underscored that advanced order flow analysis demands powerful, low-latency infrastructure to be effective in real time. DeepCharts partnered with Axcera to provide the execution, data connectivity, and reliability required to support this level of sophistication.

item.title: Axcera November 2025 Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: November 2025 marked a major milestone for Axcera, combining industry recognition, leadership expansion, and meaningful platform updates. The company was named Best Prop Trading Technology Provider 2025 and strengthened its engineering capabilities with a new VP of Engineering. Key releases improved back-office efficiency, integrations, and infrastructure readiness for advanced tools like order flow trading.

item.title: The Future of Prop Trading Is Not Challenges. It Is Retention | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article argues that the challenge-driven prop trading model is unsustainable due to extreme churn and low trader longevity. It positions retention—not challenge volume—as the future of successful prop firms. By redesigning evaluations, incentives, education, and community, firms can build long-term trader partnerships.

item.title: Prop Trading Is Scaling Fast. Most Systems Are Falling Behind | Axcera Blog
item.description: The prop trading industry is entering a more mature, professional phase where infrastructure quality is critical. Leading firms are prioritising transparency, real-time risk controls, operational precision, and compliance readiness. Axcera supports this shift with infrastructure designed for real-time visibility, automated risk and payout workflows, and hybrid business models.

item.title: Thank You for 2025 | Axcera Blog
item.description: This year-end message thanks Axcera’s clients, partners, and operational teams for their trust and collaboration throughout 2025. It reinforces Axcera’s role as a behind-the-scenes infrastructure partner supporting growth, efficiency, and trader success across the prop trading ecosystem. Looking ahead to 2026, the focus remains on clarity, reliability, and safe scaling as the industry evolves.

item.title: iFX EXPO International 2025 - Recap: Catch the Excitement and Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: This post recaps Axcera’s presence at iFX EXPO International 2025 in Limassol, where the team engaged with prop firms, brokers, and fintech leaders. The focus was on listening to industry needs around automation, risk control, and scalable infrastructure. Conversations validated growing demand for unified systems, real-time oversight, and flexible integrations.

item.title: Axcera’s February 2025 Updates: More Control, Faster Payouts, and Smarter Operations | Axcera Blog
item.description: The February 2025 update article introduces features designed to give firms more control, accelerate payouts, and streamline operations. It describes enhancements to back-office tools, automation, and payout workflows. The post highlights how these improvements support better trader satisfaction and internal efficiency.

item.title: Axcera Appoints Lubomir Marasi as Commercial Director to Strengthen Commercial Strategy and Market Growth | Axcera Blog
item.description: This announcement introduces Lubomir Marasi as Axcera’s Commercial Director. It highlights his background in growth, sales, and market expansion, and how he will shape Axcera’s commercial strategy. The post underscores Axcera’s intent to deepen market penetration and strengthen relationships with prop firms worldwide.

item.title: How Can Prop Firm Tech Help You Act Fast In Trading? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article explains how technology enables prop firms to act quickly in fast-moving markets. It outlines capabilities such as real-time monitoring, automated rules, and instant configuration changes. The post stresses that speed must be paired with robust risk controls to avoid costly mistakes.

item.title: Axcera Recognized as Industry Leader in Trading Technology | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera has been named “Best Prop Trading Technology Provider 2025” at the Finance Magnates Annual Awards, recognizing excellence in global fintech innovation. The award highlights Axcera’s leadership in building scalable, automated, and enterprise-grade prop trading infrastructure. It reflects strong trust from prop firms and industry partners worldwide.

item.title: Powering the Next Era of Trading Infrastructure | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera has appointed Dmytro Nikandrov as Vice President of Engineering, strengthening its leadership as it scales global trading infrastructure. With over 20 years of experience, Dmytro brings deep expertise in building high-performance, enterprise systems across fintech and technology leaders. In his new role, he will lead engineering strategy, product development, and platform scalability.

item.title: Introducing Axcera’s Hybrid Model: The Future of Prop Firms! | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article introduces Axcera’s Hybrid Model, designed to give prop firms more flexibility in how they structure challenges, live accounts, and capital allocation. It explains how the model combines the best of existing approaches while improving sustainability and profitability. The post suggests that hybrid setups can better align incentives between traders and the firm.

item.title: Axcera March 2025 Updates: Faster Workflows & More Control | Axcera Blog
item.description: The March update introduces a broad set of platform enhancements focused on automation, trader management, and operational reliability. The article details new tools and improvements that reduce manual workload, improve visibility, and strengthen day-to-day control for prop firms. It reflects Axcera’s continued focus on scalable, performance-driven infrastructure.

item.title: Axcera April Release.Smarter tools, smoother experience. | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera’s April release focuses on making prop firm operations smoother, faster, and more secure. The update introduces improved exports, stronger payout protection, cleaner admin views, and better certificate and contract management. Mobile performance and trader profile visibility have also been enhanced for real-time control on the go.

item.title: September 2025 Highlights | Awards, Innovation, and Industry Events | Axcera Blog
item.description: This roundup covers Axcera’s major wins in September 2025, including multiple industry awards that validate its technology and market impact. It recaps product innovations rolled out during the month and key industry events Axcera participated in. The post reinforces Axcera’s positioning as a leading technology partner for modern prop firms.

item.title: Axcera Earns Triple Recognition in Proprietary Trading Technology at the FinanceFeeds Awards 2025 | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera shares news of earning triple recognition at the FinanceFeeds Awards 2025 in proprietary trading technology categories. The article explains how these awards reflect the platform’s performance, reliability, and value to prop firms. It also underlines Axcera’s commitment to continuous product improvement and client success.

item.title: 2024: End-Of-Year Reflections | Axcera Blog
item.description: This end-of-year reflection highlights Axcera’s growth and innovation throughout 2024 despite a challenging prop trading landscape. It outlines major technology advancements, new rules supporting sustainable firm operations, expanded platform integrations, and feature launches focused on risk management, payouts, security, and operational efficiency.

item.title: Why Is Prop Trading Still Shaped By Ancient Technology? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This piece argues that much of the trading world still relies on legacy or “ancient” technology despite rapid innovation elsewhere. It explores the reasons behind this lag, such as risk aversion, regulatory constraints, and sunk costs. The article makes the case that modern, flexible infrastructure is now essential for competitive prop firms.

item.title: Who Invented Automated Trading Before Financial Technology? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post looks back at early forms of “automated” or rules-based trading that predate modern electronic systems. It explores how traders historically encoded strategies, signals, and routines into semi-automatic processes. The article links these early innovations to the principles underpinning today’s algorithmic and automated trading tools.

item.title: What Was The First-Ever Online Stock Market? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explores the origins of the first online stock market and its significance for retail and professional traders. It explains how online access changed participation, transparency, and liquidity. The article connects these developments to today’s digital trading ecosystems and prop firm opportunities.

item.title: What Features Are Needed In Futures Prop Firm Software? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This guide focuses on the specific needs of futures-focused prop trading firms. It details essential software features, including robust risk controls, data feeds, reporting, and integration with trading platforms. The article helps firms assess whether their current tools can support serious futures operations.

item.title: What Did We Learn From LSE’s Failed Electronic Trading Technology? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This piece analyses the lessons from the London Stock Exchange’s high-profile electronic trading system failures. It highlights the importance of resilience, testing, and contingency planning. The article uses this example to encourage prop firms to take reliability as seriously as speed and features.

item.title: The Most Unusual Piece Of Stock Trading Software Ever | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post tells the story of an unusual, perhaps unconventional piece of stock trading software and what made it stand out. It uses this example to explore creativity and experimentation in financial technology. The article reflects on how unexpected tools sometimes inspire more robust, mainstream solutions.

item.title: The Future of Prop Firms is Here | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article discusses the structural shift happening in the prop trading industry, including new business models, technology expectations, and trader demographics. It argues that firms must adopt advanced infrastructure, automation, and flexible offerings to stay competitive. The post reinforces Axcera’s view that the “future” is already unfolding and requires proactive adaptation.

item.title: November Tech Updates for Prop Trading Firms | Axcera Blog
item.description: The November update post summarises Axcera’s latest technology releases for prop firms. It highlights specific improvements to workflows, monitoring, and configuration tools. The article shows how each update is designed to improve speed, control, and scalability in day-to-day operations.

item.title: Learning From Failure: Lesson For Prop Firm Success | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article highlights how failures—both historical and recent—can offer powerful lessons for building successful prop firms. It discusses common causes of collapse, including weak technology, poor risk controls, and misaligned incentives. The post encourages founders to treat failure case studies as a strategic learning tool.

item.title: Is Now A Good Time To Set Up A Prop Firm? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This post examines whether current market conditions are favourable for launching a prop trading business. It considers volatility, regulatory context, competitive landscape, and technology access. The article concludes that timing can be an advantage, but only when paired with sound strategy and risk management.

item.title: How to Start a White Label Prop Firm With Full Control | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explains how entrepreneurs can launch a white-label prop firm quickly while keeping strategic and operational control. It walks through benefits like faster time-to-market, reduced upfront development, and access to tested infrastructure. At the same time, it stresses the importance of customisation, risk controls, and governance to avoid a “cookie-cutter” model.

item.title: How To Create A Prop Firm | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post outlines the key considerations for creating a prop trading firm, especially for traders coming from the forex space. It discusses business models, funding mechanisms, and technology choices. The article also emphasizes the importance of clear rules, trader evaluation, and operational discipline.

item.title: How The First Electronic Trading Platform Changed Everything | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article looks at the first electronic trading platforms and how they transformed market structure, access, and speed. It explains why this shift was so disruptive compared to traditional floor trading. The post links this history to the expectations traders and firms now have for instant, digital access.

item.title: How Technology Can Increase Prop Firm Success | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article provides a broader view of how technology contributes to prop firm success across the entire operation. It covers areas like execution, risk management, reporting, and trader support. The post argues that the right tech stack is not a cost centre but a multiplier of profitability and resilience.

item.title: How Has Prop Trading Technology Evolved Over The Years? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post charts the evolution of prop trading technology over time, from early manual processes to modern multi-platform ecosystems. It highlights milestones such as electronic trading, APIs, and cloud-based infrastructures. The article shows how each stage opened new possibilities for strategy, speed, and scale.

item.title: How Does Software Help With Risk Management? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article explains the role of software in implementing consistent, real-time risk management in trading firms. It outlines features such as limits, alerts, dashboards, and automation of protective actions. The post underlines that software-enabled risk frameworks are now essential for serious prop operations.

item.title: How Did The Financial Big Bang Affect Prop Firm Technology? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This historical article explains how the “Big Bang” deregulation in financial markets transformed trading technology and market structure. It shows how increased competition and new instruments pushed firms to adopt faster, more sophisticated systems. The post connects this era to the development of modern prop firm tech capabilities.

item.title: How Did A Green Screen Terminal Change Financial Trading? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article tells the story of early “green screen” trading terminals and their impact on market operations. It explains how these systems improved speed, access to data, and coordination compared to paper-based processes. The post connects this technological step-change to the ongoing digitisation of trading.

item.title: How Can Prop Firm Technology Help In A Market Crisis? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post discusses how technology supports prop firms during market crises, when volumes spike and volatility surges. It explains the need for robust infrastructure, dynamic risk settings, and clear dashboards. The article emphasises that firms with better tech are more likely to survive and capitalise on crisis conditions.

item.title: How Can Prop Firm Tech Handle Political Uncertainty? | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explores how well-designed prop firm technology helps firms navigate periods of political uncertainty. It describes how flexible risk settings, monitoring tools, and scenario controls can be adjusted quickly. The article encourages firms to build systems with enough agility to respond to sudden shifts in markets.

item.title: Does Your Prop Firm Need A Technology Upgrade? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article provides a diagnostic-style discussion to help firms decide if their technology stack needs an upgrade. It flags warning signs like frequent manual workarounds, slow processes, and visibility gaps. The post then explains the benefits of modernising, from better scalability to more consistent risk control.

item.title: Axcera May 2025 Release: Smarter Automation. Sharper Controls. Clearer Visibility. | Axcera Blog
item.description: The May release notes present new features focused on automation, risk controls, and operational visibility. The article outlines improvements that help teams manage workflows, monitor traders, and access clearer data. It reinforces Axcera’s roadmap of iterative enhancements that directly support prop firm performance and control.

item.title: The Future of Prop Trading: Trends Driving Prop Firms Forward | Axcera Blog
item.description: This post looks at macro and industry trends reshaping proprietary trading, from technology innovation to regulatory expectations and trader behaviour. It explains how firms that adopt flexible infrastructure, automation, and data insights are better placed to thrive. The article encourages leaders to view these trends as opportunities to modernise their operating models.

item.title: Axcera October 2025 Highlights | Axcera Blog
item.description: October 2025 was a milestone month for Axcera, marked by strong global engagement at Forex Expo Dubai and iFX EXPO Asia in Hong Kong. These events deepened partnerships and provided critical insights into regional needs around scalability, automation, and risk management. The month also set the stage for Axcera’s next leap with the beta launch of its AI-Copilot.

item.title: Axcera to Attend Forex Expo Dubai 2025 | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera announces its participation in Forex Expo Dubai 2025, held on 6–7 October, highlighting its growing presence in the global prop trading ecosystem. The post positions the event as a key opportunity to meet brokers, prop firms, and partners. It invites readers to connect with the team to explore technology, automation, and scaling solutions for prop firms.

item.title: Axcera Earns Triple Nomination at Finance Magnates Awards 2025 | Axcera Blog
item.description: Axcera has been shortlisted in three categories at the Finance Magnates Annual Awards 2025, recognizing excellence in prop trading technology. The nominations highlight Axcera’s leadership in white-label solutions, platform innovation, and rapid growth. This recognition reflects strong trust from clients and partners across the industry.

item.title: Axcera and Solitics Partner to Advance Prop Trading Automation | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article announces a strategic partnership between Axcera and Solitics to enhance automation and data-driven capabilities for prop firms. It explains how integrating Solitics’ technology will give firms better real-time insights, segmentation, and personalized flows. The post positions the partnership as a way to boost efficiency and trader experience across the lifecycle.

item.title: Gamification in Prop Trading Platforms: What Works (And What Does Not)? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article examines how gamification techniques are being used in prop trading platforms to boost engagement and trader performance. It explains which elements, such as progression systems or rewards, actually support serious trading and which can create unhealthy behaviour or regulatory concerns. The post guides prop firms on designing gamification that aligns with risk management and brand credibility.

item.title: From Startup to Global Prop Firm: Scaling Up Without Losing Control | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post addresses how prop trading startups can transition into global firms while maintaining control over risk, operations, and trader quality. It discusses common scaling challenges such as fragmented systems, manual processes, and oversight gaps. The article suggests using integrated technology and clear governance to grow safely and sustainably.

item.title: Automating a Prop Firm: How to Operate at Scale with Fewer Resources | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article makes a case for automation as a core strategy for scaling prop firms without proportionally increasing headcount. It outlines key areas to automate, including onboarding, account management, risk monitoring, and payouts. The post shows how automation reduces errors, speeds up operations, and frees teams to focus on growth and strategy.

item.title: Celebrating one year of strategic partnership: Axcera and cTrader powering modern prop trading firms | Axcera Blog
item.description: This post celebrates one year of strategic partnership between Axcera and cTrader. It reviews the benefits this collaboration has delivered, including more robust integrations and better trader experiences. The article positions the partnership as a key pillar in helping prop firms run modern, scalable operations.

item.title: Safeguarding a Prop Trading Firm: Modern Risk Management and Fraud Detection | Axcera Blog
item.description: The article focuses on the evolving risk landscape in prop trading and the importance of modern risk management tools. It outlines threats such as fraud, abuse, and platform manipulation, and how advanced monitoring and controls can address them. The post highlights technology’s role in protecting both the firm and its traders without slowing growth.

item.title: Axcera at iFX EXPO 2025: A Conversation That Matters | Axcera Blog
item.description: This preview-style post announces Axcera’s presence at iFX EXPO International 2025 at City of Dreams. It invites prop firms and partners to visit, discuss challenges, and explore how Axcera’s platform can support their strategies. The article frames the event as a chance to have meaningful conversations about the future of prop trading.

item.title: Axcera x iledgends: Helping Prop Firms Access the Right Banking Solutions | Axcera Blog
item.description: This announcement presents a collaboration between Axcera and iledgends, focused on helping prop firms secure appropriate banking and payment solutions. It explains the challenges many firms face with financial partners and compliance. The post positions the partnership as a way to reduce friction, improve reliability, and support sustainable growth.

item.title: How Risky Is Starting A Proprietary Trading Firm? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article unpacks the risks involved in starting a prop trading firm, from capital exposure and regulatory outcomes to technology and reputational risks. It compares these risks with those faced by investment funds to give context. The post encourages founders to approach risk with structure, controls, and realistic expectations rather than fear.

item.title: Delivering a Seamless Trader Experience: The Role of CRM and UX in Prop Firms | Axcera Blog
item.description: The post explores why trader experience is a competitive advantage in the prop trading industry. It details how a well-implemented CRM and thoughtful user experience (UX) help firms manage leads, onboard traders, handle support, and drive retention. The article encourages prop firms to treat trader journeys as end-to-end experiences rather than isolated tools or touchpoints.

item.title: Axcera at iFX EXPO Dubai 2025: Event Recap and Key Takeaways | Axcera Blog
item.description: This recap summarises Axcera’s experience at iFX EXPO Dubai 2025. It highlights the main themes from discussions with brokers and prop firms, such as automation, risk control, and scaling globally. The article also shares key takeaways about where the prop trading market is heading in the MENA and international regions.

item.title: How Do You Set Up A Proprietary Trading Firm? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This guide walks through the step-by-step process of setting up a proprietary trading firm. It covers planning, legal structure, technology selection, brokerage relationships, and risk frameworks. The article is geared towards founders seeking a structured pathway from idea to operational firm.

item.title: Starting A Prop Trading Firm | Axcera Blog
item.description: This guide outlines the key steps to starting a proprietary trading firm in a rapidly growing market. It covers building market knowledge, creating a solid business plan, securing licensing, and raising sufficient starting capital. The article highlights the importance of choosing the right trading and risk management technology.

item.title: What Was The Legacy Of The Nifty Fifty For Proprietary Firms? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This article looks at the historical “Nifty Fifty” stocks and their impact on investment thinking. It explores how the boom-and-bust experience shaped risk perspectives and strategies that later influenced prop firms. The post connects historical lessons to modern approaches in diversification and risk management.

item.title: Is Starting A Prop Trading Firm The Right Business For You? | Axcera Blog
item.description: This piece helps readers decide whether launching a prop firm fits their skills, goals, and risk tolerance. It walks through personality traits, operational demands, and financial realities. The article encourages a thoughtful self-assessment before committing to the path of building a prop business.

item.title: How To Start Up Your Own Prop Firm | Axcera Blog
item.description: This guide is aimed at individuals looking to transition from trader to prop firm owner. It walks through vision setting, capital planning, regulatory aspects, and technology needs. The post emphasizes building a robust foundation before aggressively scaling traders or marketing.
